title: NVM-Aware Persistence Engine (22 PRs)
entries: trustdb-nvm crate: 26 source files, ~11K lines, 214 tests — full hardware-aware persistence stack
Three-tier epoch persistence: Tier 1 dc cvap (~50ns), Tier 2 msync (~50µs), Tier 3 F_FULLFSYNC (~15ms)
Platform fences: ARM64 dc cvap/dsb/PRFM inline assembly + x86_64 CLFLUSHOPT/SFENCE/_mm_prefetch
Hardware auto-detection: Apple Silicon (FEAT_DPB), Graviton4 (Neoverse V2), x86_64 (CPUID)
MmapBackend: two-region hot/cold layout for LPDDR5X PASR bank idling
EpochWalWriter: WAL elimination from hot path (3,000x storage energy reduction)
CentralHashBuffer: WALSH-inspired wait-free concurrent append buffer
Adaptive config switching: auto Point-Hot/Scan-Hot based on scan ratio (41x range scan improvement)
Per-thread write coalescer: 8-10x fewer CAS operations for hot-key workloads
Confidence-weighted persistence: durable (>=0.8) vs soft-durable (<0.8) tiers
APFS CoW-aware crash recovery: O(1) superblock, e-1 recovery on APFS, e-2 on generic FS
Windows optimizations: VirtualLock, NUMA VirtualAllocExNuma, FlushViewOfFile control
Graviton ARM64 Fargate migration: 20% cost reduction, 30% performance improvement
Software prefetch: ARM64 PRFM + x86 _mm_prefetch for tree traversal
mmap hints: THP, MADV_RANDOM, MADV_SEQUENTIAL, MADV_WILLNEED per region
SystemProfile: full device/environment/power metadata on every benchmark result
Messaging demo workload generator + benchmark suite with comparison reports

title: TEP Exchange Protocol — Lane A semantic foundation complete
description: TrustDB Exchange Protocol (TEP) semantic foundation implemented: View<T> three-state returns (Present/ExpectedAbsent/Unknown), EBP state machine (Explore/Provisional/Commit with storage-enforced transitions), AssertionMeta (entropy + OCSS offline metadata), SyncEnvelope/SyncDelta universal exchange types, GovernanceArtifact with Blake3 integrity (compliance by construction). 5 files, 2,185 LOC, 51 tests. Wikai coordination entity created with 21 worknodes across 5 lanes for multi-session parallel build.

title: Scorecard website launched
description: First version of the TrustDB scorecard tracking all 6 pillars with deep-dive documentation.

title: Final benchmark suite complete
description: 17 workloads measured across KV, search, spatial, graph, cross-modal, and power efficiency. All benchmarks on SimulatedIo and FileIo backends.

title: GEMVT zone map pruning
description: Governance-Embedded MVCC Version Tokens with zone map pruning for governance-aware subtree skipping. Eliminates scanning irrelevant branches during confidence-filtered queries.

title: B-epsilon tuning grid optimization
description: Systematic tuning grid across epsilon (0.4, 0.6, 0.8) and flush_threshold (0-8192). Optimal config: threshold=8192, epsilon=0.8 at 8,616 ops/s (+11% over default).

title: Phase 3 optimizations deployed
description: flush_threshold optimization, Ref-to-UUID read-through cache (+3.5x), cascade batch APIs (+20-46%), BTreeMap range boundary fix, pre-serialize root split for 500+ scale.

title: Apple Silicon power measurements
description: QoS-based E-core pinning achieves 9.1x lower CPU power than SQLite WAL+NORMAL. 384mW (Tier 1 + QoS:BACKGROUND) vs 3,995mW (SQLite).

title: Phase 1 proof-of-concept benchmarks
description: Initial SimulatedIo benchmarks: 12K write ops/s, 53.8K read ops/s, 24.7K mixed 80/20 ops/s. Baseline established.

title: 678 tests passing, 0 failures
description: 124 unit tests, 40 integration tests, 10K DST crash recovery sequences, 1K WAL recovery sequences, 13/13 DB-Gym resilience tests. All passing.

title: 35+ module architecture complete
description: Full module inventory wired: tree, primitives, WAL, transactions, storage, store, merge, search, spatial, query, execution, offline, RRMS, SNBR, MAECA, cascade, TCI, edges, and more.
